headline: The price of menstrual products is skyrocketing from inflation, tariffs
summary: With rising inflation and changing tariff policies, menstrual products have seen a drastic rise in price over the past few years.

raw.headline: The price of menstrual products is skyrocketing from inflation, tariffs
raw.summary: With rising inflation and changing tariff policies, menstrual products have seen a drastic rise in price over the past few years.

headline: The Banner Year for International Stocks Has Stalled Before It Even Began
summary: This was supposed to be the year for international stocks.  Now, the Iran war has U.S. markets on top once again.  Major international benchmarks have tumbled since the start of fighting, while U.S. indexes have suffered milder losses.
